tluaLocalMultiNameFlow.tlua(19,3): error TLUA2322: Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.


==== tluaLocalMultiNameFlow.tlua (1 errors) ====
    function maybePair(): (number, string?)
      return 1;
    end
    
    // Every name in a list with a value list counts as initialized.
    local a, b = maybePair();
    
    function useBoth(): number
      if (b != nil) {
        return a + b.length;
      }
      return a;
    end
    
    // Without a value list, use-before-assignment still applies per name.
    local c, d;
    
    function useUnassigned(): number
      return c;
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    end
    
    // Narrowing works on positional values.
    local e, f = maybePair();
    
    function narrowed(): string {
      if (f == nil) {
        return "";
      }
      return f;
    }
